name: tr_4e8b2d6a0c9f
input: What does coinsurance mean?
actual_output: Coinsurance is the percentage of covered healthcare costs you pay after meeting your deductible. For example, if your plan has 20% coinsurance, you pay 20% of the cost of a covered service and your plan pays the remaining 80%, until you reach your out-of-pocket maximum.
expected_output: Coinsurance is the percentage share of covered costs the participant pays after meeting the deductible, until the out-of-pocket maximum is reached.
context: Coinsurance is the percentage of the cost of a covered healthcare service that a member pays after the deductible has been met, with the plan paying the remaining percentage until the out-of-pocket maximum is reached.
retrieval_context: doc:glossary/coinsurance -> Coinsurance: Your share of the costs of a covered healthcare service, calculated as a percentage of the allowed amount, paid after the deductible is met.

name: tr_8c4e1b6f9a3d
input: What does coinsurance mean?
actual_output: Coinsurance is the percentage of covered healthcare costs you pay after meeting your deductible.
expected_output: Coinsurance is the percentage share of covered costs the participant pays after meeting the deductible, until the out-of-pocket maximum is reached.
context: Coinsurance is the percentage of the cost of a covered healthcare service that a member pays after the deductible has been met, with the plan paying the remaining percentage until the out-of-pocket maximum is reached.
